response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two distinct musical performances within the provided clip. 2. Performed a visual review and confirmed that the first song is 'Genkaijou Koukou no Natsu' (an original/event song) and the second is 'My Soul, Your Beats!'. 3. Searched for lyrics for 'My Soul, Your Beats!' and found the complete Japanese and English text. 4. Since the first song appears to be an event-specific original without public lyrics, I manually transcribed them from the video's on-screen display. 5. Compiled metadata and lyrics into the requested JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video capturing a musical performance from Hakui Koyori's 2026 Birthday Live concert, featuring guests Houshou Marine, Sakura Miko, and IRyS. The performance includes an original song titled 'Genkaijou Koukou no Natsu' followed by a cover of 'My Soul, Your Beats!'.

scenes.description: The performers Hakui Koyori, Houshou Marine, Sakura Miko, and IRyS sing and dance to 'Genkaijou Koukou no Natsu'. The song is an original track themed around the 'Hololive Koshien 2025' event.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hakui Koyori, Houshou Marine, Sakura Miko, IRyS

ねえ諦められたことはあったっけ
あこがれは限界の彼方
もういないよ　よそかにも
ただまもるなんて　もったいないでしょ
それぞれの物語
交差する瞬間を

放たゆめだけ　おおきなこえだして
はじきれそうなきらめきも
きえることなく　どこまででも
せかいのむこうに　とどけ
であうことは　ない
このむねのしょうどうは
どうしたって　どうしても
もうゆめをよんで　いたから
いただから
そのさきへと　はしりつづける
つぎへつぎへ
あふれだす　いまこのむねで
もうくる
おわることのない

どうしたって　どうしても
もうゆめをよんで　いたから
いただから

scenes.description: The performers sing a cover of the song 'My Soul, Your Beats!' from the anime Angel Beats!.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
目覚めては繰り返す 眠い朝は
襟のタイをきつく締め
教室のドアくぐる とほんの少し
胸を張って歩き出せる
そんな日常に吹き抜ける風
聞こえた気がした
感じた気がしたんだ
震え出す今この胸で
もう来る気がした
幾億の星が消え去っていくのを
見送った
手を振った
よかったね、と
廊下の隅見下ろす掃除の途中
おかしなものだと思う
あたしの中の時は止まってるのに
違う日々を生きているように
埃は雪のように降り積む
待ってる気がした
呼んでる気がしたんだ
震え出す今この時が
見つけた気がした
失われた記憶が呼び覚ました
物語
永遠の
その終わり
いつの間にか駆けだしてた
あなたに手を引かれてた
昨日は遠く明日はすぐ
そんな当たり前に心が踊った
聞こえた気がした
感じた気がしたんだ
震え出す今この胸で
もう来る気がした
幾千の朝を越え新しい陽が
待ってる気がした
呼んでる気がしたんだ
震えてるこの魂が
見つけた気がした
幾億の夢のように消え去れる日を
見送った
手を振った
ありがとう、と
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Waking up to a repeating sleepy morning
I fasten my neck tie tightly
I walk through the door of the classroom
Able to stick out my chest ever so slightly
The wind blows right through such ordinary days
I felt like I heard it
Because I felt like I sensed it
Just now, in my heart that has begun to tremble
I felt it come again
Some hundred million stars vanishing
I saw them off
Waved goodbye
And said, “Good for you”
While cleaning I looked down into the corner of the corridor
And thought that it really was strange
Even though the time inside of me has stopped
I feel like each day I live is different
And dust piles up like snow
I felt like it was waiting for me
Because I felt like it was calling to me
Just now, this time that has begun to tremble
I felt like I had found it
The memories I lost were awoken
This is the end
Of my eternal
Story
Before I knew it, I took off running
My hand pulled along by you
Yesterday so distant and tomorrow so close
Naturally, it made my heart leap
I felt like I heard it
Because I felt like I sensed it
Just now, in my heart that has begun to tremble
I felt it come again
The new sun, crossing over a thousand mornings
I felt like it was waiting for me
Because I felt like it was calling to me
My shivering spirit
I felt like I had found it
These days that could vanish like some hundred million dreams
I saw them off
Waved goodbye
And said, “Thank you”
